text.tspan: Party A and Party B signed a storefront lease
contract on October 15, 2025. Under the contract,
Party B rents downtown street-front premises
for a 3-year term with a monthly rent of ¥8,000,
payable by the 5th day of each month. The
contract also stipulates that if the lessee delays
rent payment for more than 15 days, the lessor
may unilaterally terminate the contract and claim
liquidated damages equal to two months’ rent.
Chain-of-Thought Structure for Legal Case Analysis

tspan.tspan: - The relevant legal issue must be
- Correlate to context, define the boundary
